title: Multiple-Processor Scheduling Decision Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the key decisions and methods involved in scheduling tasks across multiple CPUs or cores in a symmetric multiprocessing (SMP) system.
relationships: Asymmetric uses a single master CPU for scheduling decisions
Symmetric allows any CPU to make scheduling decisions, requiring synchronization
Processor affinity attempts to keep a process on one CPU to exploit cache locality
Load balancing redistributes work from busy CPUs to idle ones to maximize utilization
